title: Peche Silk Elegant Frosted Glass Bottle Ad Poster
sourceTitle: Peche Silk Elegant Frosted Glass Bottle Ad Poster AI Prompt

imagePrompts.prompt: Theme: High-speed luxury shake bottle advertisement built around elegant frosted glass bottle filled with a creamy peach-vanilla shake and natural fruit swirls, PÊCHE SILK, and peach-vanilla cream, soft apricot puree ribbons, creamy vanilla tones, and glossy fruit texture. Subject: elegant frosted glass bottle filled with a creamy peach-vanilla shake and natural fruit swirls is the centered hero bottle with readable vertical label text "PÊCHE SILK", crisp frosted glass silhouette, creamy fill, and appetizing fruit texture. Scene: polished white marble surface with crisp reflection, champagne-ivory background glow, and peach-gold accents supports the product as a clean luxury studio surface with reflection, soft gradient backdrop, and premium commercial breathing room. Composition: high-velocity peach cream splash, silky apricot puree ribbons, floating peach slices, powdered sugar dust, and fine cream mist explode outward around the centered bottle in a fixed macro freeze-motion hero shot; keep the label sharp, bottle upright, reflection crisp, and splash motion sculptural. Signature Elements: peach-vanilla cream, soft apricot puree ribbons, creamy vanilla tones, and glossy fruit texture defines the edible identity while the fixed source mechanism remains a creamy high-velocity splash wrapping an elegant frosted shake bottle. Style: High-speed commercial luxury shake photography with ultra-photorealistic creamy texture, glossy fruit surfaces, macro product polish, and premium beverage-ad finish. Color Palette: Fixed blush pink, champagne ivory, creamy vanilla, fresh strawberry red or peach accent, rose-gold label typography, white marble, and soft rosy studio glow. Lighting: Glossy studio product lighting with sharp rim light around the frosted bottle, brilliant highlights on creamy splashes, delicate mist glow, and label-focused depth of field. Camera: Macro lens, eye-level angle, ultra-fast freeze-motion capture, shallow focus on the label, and gentle blur on outer splash elements. Materials: Frosted glass, embossed metallic label typography, creamy shake, fruit puree ribbons, powdered sugar mist, glossy fruit flesh, and polished marble reflection stay tactile. Typography: Render "PÊCHE SILK" as the readable minimalist vertical label text in embossed rose-gold serif typography; keep all other text minimal and intentional. Restrictions: Keep one centered beverage bottle, readable label, clean marble reflection, coherent fruit splash physics, sharp product hierarchy, and polished luxury shake-ad finish.

promptTranslations.zh:
使用以下英文图像生成提示词；保留可见文字、品牌名、变量值和参数为英文。
